title: erlangea moramballae
intro: Erlangea moramballae, also known as the African fever plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in various African cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Erlangea moramballae are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from pain and inflammation, as well as the treatment of various infections. Erlangea moramballae can be prepared as an infusion, a decoction, or a tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
